name: Tangy Blue Cheese Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Green Onion, sliced with the top
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a blender container.
2. Blend until onion is finely chopped.
3. Heat through, ensuring it's warm but not boiling.
4. Serve over vegetables.
NOTE: Refrigerate and reheat any unused sauce.
Makes 1 1/4 cups.
